description: Azure infrastructure specialist. Provisions cloud resources, networking, IAM, CI/CD. Bicep, Terraform, azd.
shouldTriggerPrompts: set up the Bicep templates for Container Apps with Key Vault
create Terraform for Azure AI Foundry with private endpoints
provision the VNet, subnets, and NSGs
write the azure.yaml and configure azd
set up GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline
create managed identity and RBAC assignments
set up the Key Vault with secret references
configure the App Service plan and deployment slots
add private endpoints for Cosmos DB and Storage
create the Bicep modules for the AI resources
shouldNotTriggerPrompts: implement MSAL authentication in the app
